title: Weltgewebe sovereign regional basemap coverage
goal: Extend and verify the local-sovereign Weltgewebe basemap region by region without allowing one healthy PMTiles archive to hide another missing or corrupt region.
completion: Every declared regional PMTiles source has a pinned build input, a versioned artifact and stable aliases.
CI and production readiness validate each regional archive independently.
Archive structure and representative tile payloads are validated beyond file hash, magic bytes and HTTP Range delivery.
